facts.place: Vine Bluff Cemetery, Nephi, Juab, Utah, United States
facts.standard_place: Vine Bluff Cemetery, Nephi, Juab, Utah, United States

facts.value:
NEPHI-Ruth Tolley Zabriskie, age 85, passed away on July 15, 2008 in Nephi, Utah.

She was born August 8, 1922 in Nephi, Utah to Hyrum Warren and Bessie Rachel Whittaker Tolley. She married Kenneth John Zabriskie September 1945. The marriage was later solemnized in the Manti Temple.

Survived by her children, Terrie (Allan) Kay of Mona; Joleen Alverson of Spanish Fork; Ken (Melinda) Zabriskie of Draper; 13 grandchildren and 36 great-grand-children. Preceded in death by her parents, her husband Kenneth; daughter, Patricia Zabriskie; son-in-law, Curtis Alverson; granddaughter, Misty Olsen and great-grand-daughter, Ashley Gardner; 12 brothers and sisters.

Funeral Services will be held at 2 p.m. on Saturday, July 19, 2008 at the Nephi North Stake Center, 1125 North 400 East. Friends may call Friday evening from 6-8 p.m. at the Anderson Funeral Home, 94 West 300 North and at the Church one hour prior to the services.
Interment will be in the Nephi Vine Bluff Cemetery.
Published in the Deseret News on 7/17/2008.
